captureSlots.label: Obverse
captureSlots.guidance: Full obverse, square to the coin, even light.

captureSlots.label: Reverse
captureSlots.guidance: Full reverse, square to the coin, even light.

captureSlots.label: Mint-mark macro
captureSlots.guidance: Macro of the mint mark and date.

captureSlots.label: Slab label
captureSlots.guidance: Grading-service label + cert number, if slabbed.

redFlags.label: Cast or tooled fake
redFlags.description: Casting seams, mushy detail, tooling marks under magnification.

redFlags.label: Altered date / mint mark
redFlags.description: Re-engraved or added date/mint mark to fake a rare variety.

redFlags.label: Cleaned / whizzed
redFlags.description: Hairlines, unnatural lustre from mechanical cleaning.

redFlags.label: Counterfeit slab
redFlags.description: Cloned holder / fake cert number for a genuine-looking grade.
